name: diagram-state
summary: Zustand store (useDiagram) is the single source of truth for all diagram data — nodes, connectors, regions, viewport, selection, name. Types defined in src/types/diagram.ts.
exposes: useDiagram() → { nodes, connectors, regions, viewport, selection, id, name, lastSaved }
key_notes: removeNode also cascades to remove all connectors attached to that node and clears selection if it pointed to it.
ID counters (nodeCounter, connectorCounter, zoneCounter) are module-level — they reset on page reload but IDs within a session are monotonically increasing.
NodeType values: microservice, database, queue, cache, aws-service, google-service, ai-model-provider, serverless.
Protocol values: http-rest, tcp, message-queue, database, websocket, streaming.
config: Record<string, unknown> — reserved underscore-prefixed keys for extended data: _contracts, _endpoints, _hasEmbedded.
